DEFTS 7/30/96 MOTION TO DISMISS & TRANSFER SMALL CLAIMS CASES 756962 &756965: MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART & DENIED IN PART. MOTION TO DISMISS IS DENIED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANG, DOUG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, ROBIN A.C/O NORTH POINT APARTMENTS WILSEY BENNETT INC. MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANG, DOUG HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF SEP-11-1996, DENIED

MOTION DISMISS CASE OR CONSOLIDATE & TRANSFER FILED BY DEFENDANT ZIEGLER, ROBIN A.C/O NORTH POINT APARTMENTS WILSEY BENNETT INC. C/O TOOVEY DOUGLAS W. NPT APTS NORTHPOINT INVESTORS NORTHPOINT APTS NP ASSOCIATES HEARING SET FOR JUL-30-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ACTION 756962 & 756965 SHOULD HAVE BEEN FILED AS 1 CASE. AT TRIAL, THE CASES WILL BE CONSTRUED
AS 1 CASE WITH $5000 LIMIT. PLFTS CAN DISMISS WITH OUT PREJUDICE PRIOR TO TRIAL AND RE-FILE IN MUNI COURT IF THEY WISH TO DO SO.
FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS HAVE FAILED TO SUSTAIN THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF.
